Localization.Description: An attempt to bypass application-start restrictions by using regasm.exe (Microsoft Windows assembly registration tool) or regsvcs.exe (Microsoft Windows .NET service installation tool)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to bypass application-start restrictions by using Microsoft Windows regsvcs.exe on host {event_src.host}
An attempt to bypass application-start restrictions by using Microsoft Windows regasm.exe on host {event_src.host}
